instructions: Implement environment detection in `verify_iso_smoketest.sh` to gracefully exit 0 when `out/` is missing, except when explicitly triggered post-build.
Refactor `verify_mirrorlist_connectivity.sh` to gracefully handle network isolation or add fallback mirror mechanisms.
constraints: Maintain fast execution times for all test scripts.
Do not mask actual errors; clearly log skipped tests vs. failures.
